'''Tarrz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[t'landa Til]] who was the head Sacredot of Colony Nine on the [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-factory [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Sniquux]] when [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] made a deal with the fledgling [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to have all priests on the world [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] in preparation for the [[Battle of Ylesia]]. While strolling through his courtyard with his fellow priests, Tarrz became victim to a well-set trap orchestrated by Sniquux. The mercenary had rigged the courtyard with monofilament wires and had played an old recording of a [[thota]], causing he and his fellow priests to panic and dismember themselves as they rushed for the exits.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
